effects.name: AEROS
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Aeros. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Reviving Tailwind
effects.effect: Once per turn: you can target 1 AIR Vivosaur in your discard pile; Charge it.

effects.name: Teffla Scale
effects.effect: Target a rested Vivosaur your Opponent controls; it cannot unrest during that player's next Recharge Phase.

effects.name: Teffla Dive
effects.effect: You can target 1 Support card in your discard pile; during your End Phase, add it to your hand.
